title: London Bridge Is Falling Down
description: The classroom standard London Bridge Is Falling Down, imported from a Kuailepu detail page and normalized into the current lightweight ocarina-tab renderer.
alignedLyrics: 伦 敦 桥 _ 要 垮 了， 要 垮 了 要 垮 了， 伦 敦 桥 _ 要 垮 了， 我 的 朋 友。
